title: beskid import lib CLI subcommand

source.subject: feat(cli): add beskid import lib subcommand

body:
CLI subcommand `beskid import lib` mutates project manifests to reference foreign libraries with validated metadata.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`3896ded`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/3896ded)
- **Subject:** feat(cli): add beskid import lib subcommand
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-mods`
- **Domain:** `tooling`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-merge-wave`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **v0.3 macro/runtime/ffi/tooling delivery** (`v03-merge-wave`).
